title: Section 18
content: 1* * * At such general meetings, no proprietor shall have more than eight votes, and 2* * * the proprietors shall vote according to the following scale:--- 2 Shares shall entitle to 1 vote. 4 2 votes. 6 3 10 4 20 6 35 7 50 8
footnote: 1. The words “And it is hereby enacted, that” omitted by Act 12 of 1891, s. 2 and Sch. I. 2. The word “that” omitted by s. 2 and Sch. I, ibid.
